name: Natasha Gomez
ai_summary: Natasha Gomez has three years of childcare experience, from infants to school age, and is based in Ogden, UT with a 20-mile travel radius. As a mother of five, she loves playing with kids and creating fun games while handling conflicts by separating children and explaining why hitting is wrong.

transcripts.q3: Hi, my name is Natasha Gomez. I have three years in childcare experience. I've worked with all ages from infants to school age. I enjoy working with kids just because I am a mom of five and it's just kind of something that I just do every day, all day. Anyways, so I just wanted to get more paid for it, I guess.
transcripts.q4: I live in Ogden Utah and I'm willing to travel up to 20 minutes away.
transcripts.q5: I can do either full-time or part-time I'm available. Anytime of the day after 7:00.
transcripts.q6: If one child hits another child, I always separate the to check on the child that had gotten hit and then let the other child know that hitting is not okay, to keep hands to themselves and maybe take a little small break and see what had caught that caused the issue.
transcripts.q7: I would make a great up kid teacher just because I love being around kids. I love playing with the kids, I love interacting making fun games and just being around kids in general.
